Mixed martial arts events
Road Fighting Championship
Information
First dateJanuary 18, 2022
Events
Fights
Chronology
2021 in Road FC Road Fighting Championship 2023 in Road FC

The year 2022 was the 13th year in the history of the Road Fighting Championship, a mixed martial arts promotion based in South Korea. 2022 starts with ARC 7.[1]

List of events

[edit]
List of events in 2022
# Event title Main event Date Arena Location
1 ARC 7 Seol vs. Song January 18, 2022 Lotte World Afreeca Colosseum, Lotte World Tower Seoul, South Korea
2 ROAD FC 60 Kim vs. Park May 12, 2022 Daegu Gymnasium Daegu, South Korea
3 ROAD FC 61 Park vs. Park July 23, 2022 Wonju Gymnasium Wonju, South Korea
4 ARC 8 Lee vs. Choi November 13, 2022 Lotte World Afreeca Colosseum, Lotte World Tower Seoul, South Korea
5 ROAD FC 62 Park vs. Yeo December 18, 2022 Swiss Grand Hotel Seoul, South Korea

ARC 7

[edit]
ARC 7
Information
PromotionRoad Fighting Championship
DateJanuary 18, 2022
VenueLotte World Afreeca Colosseum
City Seoul, South Korea
Event chronology
ARC 6 ARC 7 ROAD FC 60

AfreecaTV ROAD Championship ARC 7 was a mixed martial arts event scheduled to be held by Road FC on January 18, 2022, at the Lotte World Afreeca Colosseum, Lotte World Tower in Seoul, South Korea.

Background

[edit]

An openweight bout between debuting Young Ho Seol and Uchiha Song was scheduled as the event headliner. An openweight bout was scheduled for the event co-feature as well, which saw Dong Hyun Bae face Ho Yeon Jung.[2]

A 63 kg catchweight bout between Ji Hoon Son and Kil Soo Lee was scheduled as the featured fight of the evening.[3]

Results

[edit]
ARC 7
Weight Class Method Round T.Time Notes
Openweight Yeon Ho Seol def. Uchiha Song Decision (Unanimous) 3 3:00
Openweight Dong Hyun Bae def. Ho Yeon Jung TKO (Punches) 2 2:29
Catchweight 63 kg Su Lee Gil def. Ji Hoon Son Decision (Unanimous) 3 3:00
Catchweight 75 kg Seong Won Lee def. Jun Mo Lee TKO (Punch) 1 1:23
Lightweight 70 kg Ji Woong Choi def. Min Woo Kwon TKO (Referee Stoppage)
Lightweight 70 kg Sergey Lim def. Jong Heon Kim Submission (Kneebar) 2 1:21
Catchweight 68 kg Jin Guk Kim def. Jung Hyun Lee Submission (Von Flue choke) 2 1:47
Bantamweight 61 kg Shin Woo Lee def. Jae Hoon Lee Decision (Split) 3 3:00

Road FC 60

[edit]
Road FC 60
Information
PromotionRoad Fighting Championship
DateMay 13, 2022
VenueDaegu Gymnasium
City Daegu, South Korea

ROAD FC 60 will be a mixed martial arts event scheduled to be held by Road FC on April 30, 2022, at the Lotte World Afreeca Colosseum, Daegu Gymnasium in Daegu, South Korea.

Background

[edit]

A ROAD FC Featherweight title bout between the reigning champion Hae Jin Park and title challenger Soo Chul Kim was booked as the event headliner.[4]

A ROAD FC Bantamweight title bout for the vacant title between Ik Hwan Jang and Je Hoon Moon was scheduled as the co-main event.[5]

A special three-round boxing exhibition bout between A Sol Kwon and Young Ho Seol was booked for the event.[6]

Fight Card

[edit]
Road FC 60
Weight Class Method Round Time Notes
Featherweight 66 kg Soo Chul Kim def. Hae Jin Park (c) TKO (Head Kick and Punches) 2 0:09 For the Road FC Featherweight Championship
Catchweight 84.8 kg Young Ho Seol def. A Sol Kwon Decision (Unanimous) 3 3:00 Boxing exhibition bout
Flyweight 57 kg Jung Hyun Lee def. Seigo Yamamoto TKO (Punch) 1 3:12
Bantamweight 61 kg Ji Yong Yang def. Hyun Woo Kim Submission (Guillotine Choke) 3 2:03
Catchweight 73 kg Je Woo Yeo def. Nandin-Erdene Munguntsooj Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Middleweight 84 kg Tae Young Yoon def. Dong Hwan Lim Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Lead Card
Lightweight 70 kg Kyung Bin Jang def. Ji Hwan Yang Decision (Unanimous) 2 5:00
W.Strawweight 52 kg Seo Young Park def. Nayeon Ko Decision (Unanimous) 2 5:00
Bantamweight 61 kg Jung Hyun Lee def. Shin Woo Lee Decision (Split) 2 5:00
Catchweight 58 kg Jae Bok Jung def. Young Chan Choi KO (Punches) 2 0:31
Flyweight 57 kg Jin Woo Park def. Jun Seok Kim TKO (Punches) 1 1:54
Bantamweight 61 kg Jin Guk Kim def. Min Kyu Cho Submission (Rear-Naked Choke) 1 3:46
Lightweight 70 kg Min Hyun Kim def. Jun Won Wi Decision (Split) 2 5:00
Flyweight 57 kg Jae Min Son def. Dong Hyun Jeon Decision (Split) 2 5:00

Road FC 61

[edit]
Road FC 61
Information
PromotionRoad Fighting Championship
DateJuly 23, 2022
VenueWonju Gymnasium
City Wonju, South Korea

Road FC 61 was a mixed martial arts event scheduled to be held by Road FC on July 23, 2022, at the Wonju Gymnasium in Wonju, South Korea.

Background

[edit]

A Road FC Lightweight Championship bout for the vacant title between Si Won Park and Seung Mo Park was booked as the event headliner.[7] A flyweight bout between Jung Hyun Lee and Taiki Akiba served as the co-main event.[8]

Fight card

[edit]
Road FC 61
Weight Class Method Round Time Notes
Lightweight 70 kg Si Won Park def. Seung Mo Park TKO (Knee and Punches) 1 4:01 For the vacant Road FC Lightweight Championship
Flyweight 57 kg Jung Hyun Lee def. Taiki Akiba Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Catchweight 76 kg Nandin-Erdene Munguntsooj def. Dong Guk Shin TKO (Punch) 3 2:40
W.Atomweight 48 kg Jeong Eun Park def. Yoon Ha Hong TKO (Punches) 1 2:58
Openweight Gun Oh Shim def. Dong Hyun Bae Submission (Americana) 1 1:11
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Tae In Kim def. Jung Kyo Park TKO (Submission to Punches) 1 0:25
Part 1
Bantamweight 61 kg Jae Min Son def. Jae Nam Yoo Decision (Split) 2 5:00
Catchweight 75 kg Ji Un Choi def. Jung Gyu Lee TKO (Head Kick and Punches) 2 1:57
Middleweight 84 kg Jin Seob Jung def. Uchiha Song TKO (Knees to the Body and Punches) 1 1:38
Catchweight 63 kg Jae Sung Park def. Jung Hyun Lee Decision (Unanimous) 2 5:00
Featherweight 66 kg Min Hyung Han def. Min Soo Park Decision (Split) 2 5:00
Flyweight 57 kg Jae Hoon Lee def. Young Chan Choi Decision (Unanimous) 2 5:00

ARC 8

[edit]
ARC 8
Information
PromotionRoad Fighting Championship
DateNovember 13, 2022
VenueLotte World Afreeca Colosseum
City Seoul, South Korea

ARC 8 was a mixed martial arts event scheduled to be held by Road FC on November 13, 2022, at the Lotte World Afreeca Colosseum in Seoul, South Korea.

Background

[edit]

The event was headlined by a 139 lbs catchweight bout between Sergei Choi and Kil Soo Lee.[9]

Fight card

[edit]
ARC 8
Weight Class Method Round Time Notes
Catchweight 63 kg Sergei Choi def. Kil Soo Lee Decision (Unanimous) 3 3:00
Catchweight 90 kg Dong Hwan Lim def. Seung Ho Jung Decision (Unanimous) 3 3:00
Catchweight 55 kg Yoo Jung Kim def. Eun Jung Lee Submission (Rear-Naked Choke) 3 2:08
Catchweight 75 kg Sang Kwon Han def. Min Hyung Kim Decision (Unanimous) 3 3:00
Featherweight 65 kg Jin Guk Kim def. Shin Woo Lee TKO (Punches) 1 1:58
Featherweight 65 kg Jun Seok Kim def. Jung Won Wi Decision (Unanimous) 3 3:00
Middleweight 83 kg Woo Young Han def. Kyung Jin Ko Decision (Unanimous) 3 3:00

ROAD FC 62

[edit]
ROAD FC 62
Information
PromotionRoad Fighting Championship
DateDecember 18, 2022
VenueSwiss Grand Hotel
City Seoul, South Korea

ROAD FC 62 was a mixed martial arts event scheduled to be held by Road FC on December 18, 2022, at the Swiss Grand Hotel in Seoul, South Korea.

Background

[edit]

A ROAD FC lightweight championship bout between champion Si Won Park and title challenger Je Woo Yeo headlined the event,[10] while a 161 lbs catchweight bout between A Sol Kwon and Koji Nakamura served as the co-main event.[11]

Fight card

[edit]
ROAD FC 62
Weight Class Method Round Time Notes
Lightweight 70 kg Si Won Park (c) def. Je Woo Yeo Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00 For the ROAD FC Lightweight Championship
Catchweight 73 kg Koji Nakamura def. A Sol Kwon Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Bantamweight 61 kg Je Hoon Moon def. Ik Hwan Jang Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00 For the vacant ROAD FC Bantamweight Championship
Lightweight 70 kg Hae Jin Park (c) def. Seung Mo Park Technical Submission (Arm-Triangle Choke) 2 4:40 For the ROAD FC Featherweight Championship
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Tae In Kim def. Daniel Gomes KO (Punch and Knee) 1 0:13 For the inaugural ROAD FC Light Heavyweight Championship
Middleweight 84 kg Tae Young Yoon def. Young Chul Lee KO (Head Kick) 1 3:31
Prelims
Bantamweight 61 kg Vitaliy Mironyuk def. Jin Guk Kim Submission (Baseball Choke) 1 4:21
Bantamweight 61 kg Yoon Seo Shin def. Sang Kwon Han Submission (Rear-Naked Choke) 2 3:11
Flyweight 57 kg Jae Min Son def. Jae Bok Jung KO (Knee to the Body) 2 1:21
Catchweight 60 kg Dong Soo Seo def. Young Chan Choi Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Catchweight 50 kg Yoo Jung Kim def. Seo Young Park Submission (Rear-Naked Choke) 1 2:53
Bantamweight 61 kg Min Hyuk Cha def. Tae Sun Hong Decision (Unanimous) 2 5:00
Featherweight 66 kg Jung Hyun Lee def. Min Hyung Han Decision (Unanimous) 2 5:00
